title: Login with Facebook
test_steps: Open the Vingle app. | Click on the 'Log In' button. | Select 'Facebook' as the login option. | Enter Facebook credentials. | Click the 'Log In' button. | Verify if the user is logged in successfully.

title: Login with Google
test_steps: Open the Vingle app. | Click on the 'Log In' button. | Select 'Google' as the login option. | Enter Google credentials. | Click the 'Log In' button. | Verify if the user is logged in successfully.

title: Login with Email
test_steps: Open the Vingle app. | Click on the 'Log In' button. | Select 'Start with Email' as the login option. | Enter email credentials. | Enter password. | Click the 'Log In' button. | Verify if the user is logged in successfully.

title: Login with Invalid Email
test_steps: Open the Vingle app. | Click on the 'Log In' button. | Select 'Start with Email' as the login option. | Enter invalid email credentials. | Enter password. | Click the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: Login attempt fails with error message.

title: Login with Empty Email
test_steps: Open the Vingle app. | Click on the 'Log In' button. | Select 'Start with Email' as the login option. | Enter empty email credentials. | Enter password. | Click the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: Login attempt fails with error message.

title: Login with Invalid Password
test_steps: Open the Vingle app. | Click on the 'Log In' button. | Select 'Start with Email' as the login option. | Enter valid email credentials. | Enter invalid password. | Click the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: Login attempt fails with error message.

title: Login with Empty Password
test_steps: Open the Vingle app. | Click on the 'Log In' button. | Select 'Start with Email' as the login option. | Enter valid email credentials. | Enter empty password. | Click the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: Login attempt fails with error message.

title: Login with Invalid Credentials
test_steps: Open the Vingle app. | Click on the 'Log In' button. | Select 'Start with Email' as the login option. | Enter invalid email credentials. | Enter invalid password. | Click the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: Login attempt fails with error message.
